content_text: {"task_id":"task-001","attempted_changes":["{\"diff_text\":\"diff --git a/main.py b/main.py\\n--- a/main.py\\n+++ b/main.py\\n@@ -24,3 +24,8 @@ app = FastAPI()\\n @app.get(\\\"/items/{item_id}\\\")\\n def read_item(item_id: int) -> dict[str, object]:\\n     return {\\\"item_id\\\": item_id}\\n+\\n+\\n+@app.get(\\\"/health\\\")\\n+def health() -> dict[str, str]:\\n+    return {\\\"status\\\": \\\"ok\\\"}\\n\",\"task_id\":\"task-001\",\"kind\":\"production_patch\",\"target_paths\":[\"main.py\"]}"]}
